label: CIS Safeguard 9.1
title: Ensure Use of Only Fully Supported Browsers and Email Clients

prose.en: Ensure only fully supported browsers and email clients are allowed to execute in the enterprise, only using the latest version of browsers and email clients provided through the vendor.
Only fully supported browsers and email clients are allowed to execute in the enterprise.
Only the latest version of browsers and email clients provided through the vendor is used.
